markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Caratini records 3+ hits in the Los Angeles A vs Minnesota professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 2:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Victor Caratini is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Victor Caratini starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Victor Caratini is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Victor Caratini is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Victor Caratini: 3+ hits?
